stages.detail: Median imputation (9 cols), Unknown fill for categoricals; fit on train only — no leakage
Remove VehBCost=0 and VehicleAge<0; applied to training set only
7 new features added (PurchMonth, PurchWeekday, PriceDeviation, OdoPerYear, RetailPotential, CurrentValueRatio, WarrantyToCostRatio); 6 high-cardinality cols dropped; warranty median from train only
Vehicle Profile Clustering: ANOVA F=388, p<0.001; risky cluster excluded from GEM; predict() applied to test set (no re-fit)
StandardScaler (numerical) + OneHotEncoder (categorical, handle_unknown=ignore) + StandardScaler→PCA(2) (8 MMR price cols → 95.77% variance)
GridSearchCV (3-fold, 48 combos × 3 = 144 fits); class_weight=balanced; best: n_estimators=400, max_depth=20
OOF threshold calibration via cross_val_predict (5-fold, zero leakage); 3-tier strategy applied to predict_proba output; Wilson 95% CI validation

anti_leakage: DataCleaner.fit() only on training set; .transform() applied to test
engineer_features() uses training warranty_to_cost median for test transformation
K-Means fitted on training features, predict() applied to test
OOF threshold calibrated via cross_val_predict — test set never used in calibration
GridSearchCV scoring operates only on training folds
